task_completion.description: Read the specification sheet for the quadrotor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/nasa_uam_quadrotor_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Add a central Fuselage or Pod component with a length of approximately 8.0 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry browser shows a Fuselage or Pod component, and the parameter window shows its length set to approximately 8.0.

task_completion.description: Add 4 independent Propeller components to the model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry browser explicitly lists four separate Propeller components (e.g., Prop, Prop_2, Prop_3, Prop_4).

task_completion.description: Set the Diameter of each Propeller to 6.52 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP Design tab for the propellers shows the 'Diameter' parameter set to 6.52.

task_completion.description: Rotate each Propeller by 90 or -90 degrees in Pitch so the thrust axis points vertically.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D view shows the propellers oriented vertically, or the XForm tab shows Pitch (Y-rotation) set to 90 or -90.

task_completion.description: Translate each Propeller to its designated hub location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D view shows the propellers in a quadrotor layout (four corners), or the XForm tab shows Location X=±3.26, Y=±3.26, Z=1.5.

task_completion.description: Save the completed model as nasa_quadrotor.vsp3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 'Save As' dialog or a file manager shows the file saved as '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/nasa_quadrotor.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP graphical user interface to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenVSP application window, rather than writing an XML .vsp3 file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use symmetry checkboxes to fake the rotors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Four distinct Propeller components are visible in the geometry browser, and X/Y/Z symmetry checkboxes are not used to duplicate a single propeller.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the OpenVSP application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP File > Save or Save As dialog is used, rather than creating a dummy file via terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target diameter for the propellers is exactly 6.52 m. The target locations for the four propellers are X=±3.26, Y=±3.26, Z=1.5. The final model must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/nasa_quadrotor.vsp3. Four distinct Propeller components must be visible in the OpenVSP geometry browser (no symmetry shortcuts).
